resources.string: Listening for shakes to toggle flashlight
This service listens to the accelerometer to toggle the flashlight when the user shakes the device, even when the screen is off.
Keep the background service running to detect shakes even when the app is closed.
Round slider values to the nearest logical step for easier adjustment.
Temporarily disable shake detection if a free-fall is detected to avoid accidental activation.
Toggle between using sliders or typing numbers for configuration.
Adjust the granularity of slider movements when snapping is enabled.
This app requires Camera and Notification permissions to work correctly. Without them, the flashlight cannot be controlled and the background service cannot show a notification.
Camera permission is required for the flashlight.
Notification permission is required for the background service.
